Controls GPIO pins for LED blinking and defines a system loop function with a confirmation message.


## Files
- **[blink.js](blink.js.md)**: Controls GPIO pins to toggle an LED blink pattern on an ESP8266.
- **[main.js](main.js.md)**: Defines a system loop function and prints a confirmation message.
